honesty: Prefill GEMM M-amortization MEASURED on the Card (1x1-conv proxy, dev FPS) at the FULL-tile prefill points M in {64,128,256}; M>256 fails to compile (v1.6 SRAM wall) -> extrapolation. The M=1 decode point is reported separately (different regime), NOT in the prefill fit. Decode (M=1) G_eff fit unchanged.

affine_fit_tile_lat_us.fit_basis: M in {64,128,256} (prefill only; M=1 decode excluded)

decode_anchor_M1_measured.note: measured decode (M=1) tile on its measured basis; NOT in the prefill fit (different regime: direct single-column compile, modeled by G_eff)

fit_quality.enforced: main() sys.exit if max_rel_err > 0.05 -> params not written

tile_throughput_monotone_in_M.note: M=1 on the measured decode basis; M>=64 from the fit

decode_card_revalidation.note: median |rel_diff| over the alpha13 pts (computed here; matches validate_cim_card). <= 0.10 (with n >= 8) -> the Alpha G_eff is Card-confirmed, freeze lifted.

ttft_cross_val_note: 8B prefill TTFT cross-validation (linear-M refuted vs M-amortized) is in recompose_e2e.py (P14) -> twopillar_prediction_fitted.json.
extrapolation_note: M>256 OR partial-width tiles (K or N not a multiple of 2048) extrapolate beyond the full-tile measured range; CimTileModel.prefill_extrapolated flags them.
